summary: Build W14 (~20 mi) — test week. Wed is the mid-build test (3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T, §10): it arbitrates the held T pace 7:50-7:55 (RPE 8+ there → drop 10 s/mi, Adj #166) and the calendar placement of the two spare weeks is decided by it (Adj #167). Tue landed both attempts: incline 155x5 RIR 2 → 160 next Tue (Adj #195); pushdown 27.5 pain-clean — both slots run 27.5, Sat included (Adj #198); rear-delt repeat RIR 4/4 → nudge 140 next Tue (Adj #200). Fri progresses VO2 to 6x3 min @ I on 2:30 rec — keep reps in-band 7:10-7:25 (Adj #178). Hill strides still unperformed since W10, next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194).

days.note: Logged — 35 min treadmill @ 10:31/mi avg, 0.5% incline, ~3.3 mi; cadence 169; HR avg 164 (display-only); no pain reported = clean by default (Adj #188). Hill strides SKIPPED — unperformed since W10 Mon 6-22, next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 155 bump + pushdown 27.5 attempt
days.note: Logged — incline 155x5 RIR 2 + AMRAP 135x11 landed → 160 next Tue (Adj #195); pushdown 27.5x12/11/8/7 pain-clean, 6th clean elbow session — both slots run 27.5 (Adj #198); rear-delt 15/15 RIR 4/4 → nudge 140 next Tue (Adj #200). Holds: lateral 30 (Adj #196), preacher 70 (Adj #197), crunch +10 — first Tue 12 (Adj #199).

days.session: W14 TEST — 3K TT or 4x1 mi @ T (§10)
days.note: Arbitrates T: should feel exactly RPE 7 at 7:50-7:55; RPE 8+ → drop paces 10 s/mi (Adj #166). Calendar placement of the two spare weeks decided off this test (Adj #167). First quality outing in the Vomero Plus (Adj #193). If treadmill: 1% incline (Adj #177).

days.session: Off — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab

days.note: Second I-pace session — shorter recoveries do the progressing; keep reps in-band 7:10-7:25, no off-band closer (Adj #178). Fast end earned after this lands (Adj #176).

days.session: Long run 60 min Z1 AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)

Pushdown runs 27.5 — Tue's attempt landed pain-clean (Adj #198).
